name: Ellipse
summary: Represents the values of a plane and the two semi-axes radii in an ellipse.

constructors.name: Ellipse(Plane, Double, Double)
constructors.signature: public Ellipse(Plane plane, double radius1, double radius2)
constructors.summary: Initializes a new ellipse from base plane and both principal radii.

params.name: radius1
params.doc: Ellipse radius along base plane X direction.

params.name: radius2
params.doc: Ellipse radius along base plane Y direction.

constructors.name: Ellipse(Point3d, Point3d, Point3d)
constructors.signature: public Ellipse(Point3d center, Point3d second, Point3d third)
constructors.summary: Initializes a new ellipse from a center point and the two semi-axes intersections.

params.name: center
params.doc: A center for the ellipse. The average of the foci.

params.name: second
params.doc: The intersection of the ellipse X axis with the ellipse itself.

params.name: third
params.doc: A point that determines the radius along the Y semi-axis. If the point is at right angle with the (center - second point) vector, it will be the intersection of the ellipse Y axis with the ellipse itself.

methods.name: EpsilonEquals
methods.signature: public bool EpsilonEquals(Ellipse other, double epsilon)
methods.summary: Check that all values in other are within epsilon of the values in this

methods.name: GetFoci
methods.signature: public void GetFoci(out Point3d F1, out Point3d F2)
methods.summary: Gets the foci. The foci are two points whose sum of distances from any point on the ellipse is always the same.

methods.name: ToNurbsCurve
methods.summary: Constructs a nurbs curve representation of this ellipse. This is equivalent to calling NurbsCurve.CreateFromEllipse().

returns.doc: A nurbs curve representation of this ellipse or null if no such representation could be made.

properties.name: Center
properties.summary: Gets or sets the center of the ellipse.

properties.name: FocalDistance
properties.summary: Gets the distance from the center to a focus.

properties.name: IsValid
properties.summary: Returns an indication of the validity of this ellipse.

properties.name: Plane
properties.summary: Gets or sets the base plane of the ellipse.

properties.name: Radius1
properties.summary: Gets or sets the radius of the ellipse along the base plane X semi-axis.

properties.name: Radius2
properties.summary: Gets or sets the radius of the ellipse along the base plane Y semi-axis.
